name: Chicken Parmigiana Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Loaf bread or pizza dough
recipeInstructions:
This is a 2 phase recipe, and makes 2 loaves.
PHASE 1:
1. Heat olive oil in frying pan.
2. Mix grated Parmesan cheese with seasoned bread crumbs.
3. For each chicken cutlet: dip in milk, dredge in flour, dip in egg, dredge in bread crumb mixture.
4. Fry cutlets until browned on each side.
PHASE 2:
1. Heat olive oil and margarine in a pan until bubbling, then add minced garlic.
2. Roll out bread dough to make an 11 x 17 rectangle. Slice it in half.
3. For each half of the dough: brush with garlic mixture, turn on diagonal so that dough appears diamond-shaped. Lay half of the cutlets across the long end of the dough, cover with slices of mozzarella cheese. Bring the two short ends over the top of the cutlets to seal; brush top of dough with garlic mixture.
4. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes, or until bread is golden brown.
